entries.desc: Pheme news feeds — id/label/url/format rows (the Rumormill).
Midas tickers — also the source for Plutus's ledger dropdown.
Morpheus playlists — label/url rows for the audio engine.
Hypatia constellation lore — hand-curated mythology text per constellation.
Calliope narrator — voice, speed, language, and TTS model paths.
Sphynx gate PIN hash — the Number of Bane that guards the app itself.
This file — the Custody list of config files and their descriptions.
